allow: Bash(docker exec micro-frontend-audio-service ping -c 2 api.assemblyai.com 2>&1 || docker exec micro-frontend-audio-service nslookup api.assemblyai.com 2>&1 || docker exec micro-frontend-audio-service cat /etc/resolv.conf)

Bash(docker system df && echo "" && echo "=== Volume Details ===" && docker volume ls --format "table {{.Name}}\\t{{.Driver}}" | grep -E "micro|translation|mysql" && echo "" && echo "=== Translation Outputs Size ===" && docker exec micro-frontend-audio-service du -sh /app/outputs /app/uploads 2>/dev/null || echo "Could not check")
Bash(docker-compose down && docker-compose build --no-cache audio-mf shell-app && docker-compose up -d)
Bash(echo "Local:" && yt-dlp --version && echo "" && echo "Docker:" && docker-compose exec translation-service yt-dlp --version)
Bash(docker-compose build --no-cache dashboard-mf && docker-compose up -d dashboard-mf)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Added YouTube download feature with hidden UI

Features:
- Backend: YouTube download service with yt-dlp integration
- UI: Hidden route at /youtube \(accessible from Dashboard Quick Actions\)
- Download audio \(MP3\) and/or video-only \(MP4\) from YouTube
- Mac compatibility: Auto-selects best H.264/MP4 format
- Storage: Auto-cleanup 5 minutes after user downloads

Dashboard improvements:
- Added YouTube Download button to Quick Actions
- Removed non-functional Job History and Edit Profile cards

Documentation:
- Added DEVELOPMENT.md for feature tracking
- Updated CLAUDE.md with documentation structure

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
